name: Ultimate Adventure Combo
tagline: Bungee + Zipline + Giant Swing. The ultimate adrenaline package.

includes.name: Zipline
includes.description: High speed zipline over the valley

experience_flow.title: Arrival & Briefing
experience_flow.description: Report at Splash Adventures base camp. Safety briefing and gear fitting.

experience_flow.title: Bungee Jump
experience_flow.description: 109 metre water touch bungee jump with free DSLR video.

experience_flow.title: Zipline
experience_flow.description: High speed zipline ride over the valley.

experience_flow.title: Giant Swing
experience_flow.description: Pendulum swing over the gorge for the final rush.

faqs.a: Yes, all activities use internationally certified equipment and trained instructors.
Minimum 35kg and maximum 120kg for all activities.
Yes but the combo price is significantly cheaper.

policies.title: Cancellation Policy
points:
Non-refundable within 24 hours.
Full credit note for weather cancellations.

name: Rafting + Bungee Combo
tagline: Conquer the rapids then leap from 109 metres. Best of both worlds.

experience_flow.title: Morning Rafting
experience_flow.description: Start with 16km river rafting from Shivpuri to Rishikesh through Grade III+ rapids.

experience_flow.title: Lunch Break
experience_flow.description: Rest and refresh at the base camp.

experience_flow.title: Bungee Jump
experience_flow.description: End the day with a 109 metre bungee jump.

faqs.q: Is this a full day activity?
faqs.a: Yes, plan for approximately 6-8 hours including travel between locations.
Comfortable clothes you don't mind getting wet. Avoid loose footwear.

policies.title: Cancellation Policy
points:
Non-refundable within 24 hours.
Full credit note for weather cancellations.
